title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
